problem id: b631f2b8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: I XOR NOT

examples:
  10100010 -> 11111111
  11010110 -> 11111111
  00100011 -> 11111111
  01000110 -> 11111111
  01000000 -> 11111111
  00100100 -> 11111111
  01000101 -> 11111111
  01000111 -> 11111111
  00001010 -> 11111111

query: 11010010
predicted answer: 11111111
